# Homebound

> Homebound is a personal safety app for outdoor adventurers. Create trip plans with expected return times, add safety contacts, optionally share your live location with people you trust, and if you don't check out on schedule, your contacts are automatically notified with your trip details and location.

Homebound is available on iOS via the [App Store](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/homebound-check-in/id6754800989).

## What Homebound Does

Homebound works as a dead man's switch for outdoor activities. Users create a trip with an activity type, destination, expected return time, and grace period. They assign safety contacts who receive notifications at key moments: when the trip starts, when the user checks in, when they check out safely, and critically, when they go overdue. If the user doesn't mark themselves safe by their ETA plus grace period, contacts are automatically alerted with full trip details and last known location. Beyond overdue alerts, users can optionally share their live location—during a trip, or with a chosen Circle of friends for a set time—and watch the people they care about move on a live map.

## Who It's For

- Solo hikers, climbers, skiers, mountain bikers, kayakers, surfers, divers, boaters, and anyone doing outdoor activities alone
- College students walking home at night or going to parties
- Parents tracking kids on field trips
- Anyone going somewhere and wanting someone to know their plan and expected return time
- Groups of up to 20 people doing outdoor activities together

## Key Features

- **Trip Plans**: Create trips with activity type, location, start time, ETA, grace period, and notes
- **Plan From Anywhere**: Create trips even without a signal—they activate automatically when you reconnect, with automatic time-zone detection
- **Safety Contacts**: Add up to 2 contacts per trip (5 with Homebound+) who receive email notifications automatically
- **Automatic Overdue Alerts**: If you don't check out by ETA + grace period, contacts get your trip details and last known location
- **Alerts That Reach You**: Safety notifications break through Focus and Do Not Disturb and appear on CarPlay, so important alerts are never missed
- **Group Trips**: Plan adventures with up to 20 participants; each person checks in and finishes individually (everyone is notified as each member gets home), people can be added after a trip starts, and watched members appear together on one live map
- **Live Location Sharing**: Share real-time GPS position with safety contacts during active trips
- **Circles**: Share your live location with a chosen group of friends for a set duration—a day, 3 days, or a week—independent of any trip, and stop anytime
- **Live Map**: See the friends and trip participants who are sharing with you, live, on one map
- **Live Activity & Dynamic Island**: See trip countdown on lock screen and Dynamic Island; check in without unlocking
- **Friends**: Connect with other Homebound users, see each other's active trips, request check-in updates
- **Safety Score**: 0-100 score based on on-time rate, check-in rate, and contact coverage (computed on-device)
- **Weekly Recap**: Summary of adventure hours, trip count, and safety habits
- **Achievements**: 40+ badges and milestones across categories like streaks, night adventures, and more
- **Trip Map**: Interactive map of all past adventures
- **Discover**: Find nearby places and activities with current conditions, from trailheads and climbing spots to concerts
- **Trip History & Search**: Browse and search past trips (30 days free, unlimited with Homebound+)
- **Widgets**: Home screen widgets for quick trip access
- **Custom Notification Messages**: Personalize the messages your contacts receive
- **Trip Saving**: Save up to 10 trip templates for quick reuse
- **Data Export**: Export your trips, contacts, and profile data anytime
- **Check-In Reminders**: Set intervals to remind you to check in during trips
- **ETA Extension**: Add up to 4 hours to your return time with one tap if running late

## Pricing

All core safety features are free. Homebound+ is a premium subscription that increases limits:

- **Free**: Up to 2 safety contacts per trip, 30 days of trip history, all other features included
- **Homebound+**: Up to 5 safety contacts per trip, unlimited trip history, Family Sharing on annual plan

## Privacy

- Location is only collected when users explicitly choose to share it (setting trip location, checking in, or live sharing)
- No background location tracking unless you turn on live sharing—either during an active trip or while sharing with a Circle—and you can stop anytime
- Safety score and weekly recap are computed entirely on-device
- No data sold to advertisers
- Full account deletion available in settings
- Contact: privacy@homeboundapp.com

## Platform

- iOS only (iPhone)
- Requires internet for check-in, checkout, and notifications
- Trips can be created offline and activate automatically once you reconnect; cached trip details are viewable without service

## Important Note

Homebound is not a replacement for calling 911 or emergency services. It is a supplementary safety tool that notifies personal contacts. In an emergency, always call emergency services first.
